prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG world atlas map, first batch pass, landscape orientation
Primary request: D&D 5e / Forgotten Realms inspired high fantasy world map, single huge primary continent.
Scene/backdrop: overhead birds-eye atlas view surrounded by ocean, continent-scale geography.
Subject: one enormous primary continent with complex realistic coastline: peninsulas, gulfs, bays, capes, fjords, narrow straits, broken coastal shelves, curved shores, river deltas, inland seas, and varied landforms.
Style/medium: illustrated fantasy world map, cartographic parchment style, Tolkien-esque continent, digital fantasy concept art, highly detailed illustration, vibrant but readable atlas colors, professional RPG sourcebook quality.
Composition/framing: wide 16:9 landscape map, very large scale, full map visible with generous ocean border, no cropped landmasses.
Lighting/mood: heroic high fantasy, magical atmosphere, wondrous ancient ruins, frontier towns, scattered dungeon entrances, glowing rune stones, distant dragon silhouettes kept tiny and decorative.
Color palette: parchment tan oceans and inked coastlines with rich biome colors for forests, deserts, wetlands, tundra, mountains, river basins, and coastal regions.
Materials/textures: aged parchment, engraved ink lines, hand-painted terrain, fine cartographic detail.
Constraints: no text labels, no letters, no legend, no compass text, no watermark, no UI, no characters or portraits; keep it as a clean world map. Make the landmass and coastlines more realistic and complex than a simple blob.
